fields.name: Year

fields.name: Date
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the specific month and year for which the highest recorded temperature in Amherst was measured, serving as a time identifier in a climatological dataset.

fields.name: Temperature
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the monthly highest temperature (in degrees Fahrenheit) observed in Amherst, representing historical climate data for weather analysis or environmental monitoring.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Monthly_highest_temperature_in_Amherst (140 rows × 3 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 461.csv (Dataset: Monthly highest temperature in Amherst)

### Schema (3 fields)
  - Year -- type: int64, values: 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, ..., 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015
  - Date -- type: object, values: 2004/1/1, 2004/10/1, 2004/11/1, 2004/12/1, 2004/2/1, ..., 2015/4/1, 2015/5/1, 2015/6/1, 2015/7/1, 2015/8/1
  - Temperature -- type: int64, values: 41, 42, 44, 47, 49, ..., 94, 95, 96, 97, 98

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```
   Year      Date  Temperature
0  2004  2004/1/1           49
1  2004  2004/2/1           54
2  2004  2004/3/1           89
3  2004  2004/4/1           88
4  2004  2004/5/1           92
```
